    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the key specs to compare in graphics cards?
        Key specifications to compare include GPU model, memory type and size, core clock speed, and power connectors. Higher memory and faster speeds generally offer better performance for gaming and graphics-intensive applications.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • How does VRAM affect graphics card performance?
        VRAM (Video RAM) is crucial for storing image data. More VRAM allows a graphics card to handle higher resolutions and more complex textures. This is particularly important for gaming and professional graphic design or video editing.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What are the benefits of integrated vs. dedicated graphics cards?
        Integrated graphics are built into the CPU and are cost-effective for basic tasks. Dedicated graphics cards are separate components that provide superior performance for gaming, video editing, and other graphics-intensive tasks.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
